    IllegalFormulaException
     
    IsabelleHandler
    This class is a slightly adjusted version of SMTHandler.
    IsabelleHandler.Capability
    An enumeration of the possible answers of a handler to the IsabelleHandler.canHandle(Term) method.
    IsabelleHandlerServices
    Adapted version of the SMTHandlerServices for the Isabelle translation.
    IsabelleMasterHandler
    This class is responsible for translating the sequent of a given goal.
